title: Junior Project Manager
description:
We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Junior Project Manager to support the successful delivery of projects valued up to 5M, with a focus on point solution (PS) and distributor-led initiatives.

Key Responsibilities:
- Manage small, straightforward projects through the full lifecycle (initiation to closeout)
- Develop and maintain project plans, schedules, and budgets
- Build and maintain collaborative project schedules aligned with contractual obligations
- Develop resource plans that support budget and schedule requirements
- Coordinate activities across cross-functional teams
- Lead project meetings, document decisions, track action items
- Prepare and distribute project status reports
- Track contract milestones and deliverables, vendor compliance
- Track project expenses against approved budgets
- Support risk and issue management
- Complete engineering design tasks (within team)

Requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Business, or related field
- 1–3 years of project management experience
- Proficiency in project management tools (MS Project, Primavera, or similar)
- Strong organizational and communication skills
- Experience in manufacturing or automation preferred
- PMP certification is a plus
